author: u/dev_frustrated22
text: Anyone else's ElevenLabs voice cloning sound completely fake unless you feed it studio-quality samples? Spent 2 days on this, output still sounds robotic. Might just switch to a competitor at this point.

author: u/buildingwithapis
text: Getting charged full credits on ElevenLabs even when the generation glitches out with weird pauses and volume changes. Feels like paying for broken output, no refund path either.
